CREQ_cpp_catalog.title: Catalog class holds metadata
CREQ_cpp_catalog.content: The class Catalog shall expose a public name field of type std::string.

CREQ_cpp_catalog_config.title: CatalogConfig carries tuning knobs
CREQ_cpp_catalog_config.content: The struct CatalogConfig shall declare max_items as an integer.

CREQ_cpp_load_catalog.title: load_catalog reads catalogue
CREQ_cpp_load_catalog.content: The function load_catalog shall throw CatalogError when the path argument is empty.

CREQ_cpp_save_catalog.title: save_catalog writes catalogue
CREQ_cpp_save_catalog.content: The function save_catalog shall throw InvalidPathError when the path argument is empty.
